title: Ruling
Details
table-386-386.caption: Write down the ruling of Beacon of Immortality.
data: If a player's life total is less than 0 when Beacon of Immortality resolves, their life total becomes twice their current life total, which will still be less than 0.
Replacement effects (like those from Platinum Angel or Worship) may modify the effect of Beacon of Immortality.
Beacon of Immortality targets a player. If that player becomes an illegal target before Beacon of Immortality resolves, the spell will be countered.
If Beacon of Immortality is copied (e.g., with Twincast), the copy will affect a different target. Each copy resolves independently, doubling the respective target's life total.
Resolving multiple Beacon of Immortality spells on the same player will double their life total each time, resulting in exponential growth.
